full_text:
Chen Feng йҷійіі
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Feng (йҷійіі). Captured by Xie Jing and Li Yi, he surrendered to Wu. Chen Feng was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Wu Kingdom.
